brand.name: PinStory
brand.tagline: Turn your memories into a living map

seo.title: PinStory | Create Your Unique Interactive Memory Map
seo.description: Map your most beautiful moments on a personalized interactive map. The perfect emotional gift, instantly accessible via a unique QR Code.

landing.eyebrow: Virtual emotional gift with a QR Code memory map
landing.hero_title: Create a custom memory map to share your most meaningful moments
landing.hero_copy: PinStory turns places, photos and messages into an interactive travel map, personalized relationship map or family keepsake. A unique anniversary gift idea and digital photo keepsake built to be shared.
landing.emotional_title: The perfect emotional gift for couples, families and travelers
landing.emotional_copy: Every point becomes a chapter of your story: a first meeting, a promise, a trip or a new beginning. Your virtual emotional gift stays accessible through a private link or premium QR Code.
landing.map_title: An interactive travel, love or family map

map.expired: This memory is no longer available
